notes: v388 — 📜 See your trade history on your phone. On mobile the History tab was coming up blank: the trade table was built for a wide screen and had no phone layout to fall back on. Now every closed trade shows as its own card (just like your holdings do) — the share, how it exited (🎯 target · 🛑 stop · 🪤 trailing stop · sold at market), buy→sell prices, days held, P/L and fees, plus the ↩ Undo and 🗑 Delete buttons right there. Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
